summary: Top‑notch matrix mix captures a blistering second set with the Wheel > NTAW transition and a legendary shakedown jam.
review: The matrix recording is praised as crystal‑clear, even surpassing the original soundboard, while the performance itself is lauded for an unstoppable second set highlighted by The Wheel > NTAW and an ecstatic shakedown jam. Reviewers repeatedly note the superb interplay between Jerry and Brent and describe the show as one of the finest early‑80s runs.

ai_rating.rationale: Overwhelmingly positive comments on both musical performance (standout second set, iconic jams) and technical quality (excellent matrix mix), with the majority of reviewers giving 5‑star ratings.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe the sound as top‑notch, clearer than the original SBD, with a pleasant audience ambience; only minor comment about leaning toward audience mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A non‑stop, high‑energy second set with seamless transitions (especially The Wheel into NTAW) and an extended shakedown jam that many call legendary.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for tight, Miles‑like guitar work syncing perfectly with Brent.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent's keyboards likened to Herbie Hancock, providing a jazzy, flawless backdrop.
